title: Debris
body:
## 📖 About:
This texture pack changes the appearance of the Ancient Debris Block. The textures of the block will glow when using Shader with LabPbr or SEUSPBR (OldPbr) -Support.
With this pack you can therefore much easier recognize the Ancient Debris blocks in the Nether

## ✅ Features:

Glowing Ancient Debris
## 💡 Info:
This package works in all versions, even if it says that it is only for 1.18.
Activate the pack in Minecraft despite the fact that it is too old or too new.

## ❓ F.A.Q.

**For which MC version is the pack?**\
The package should work in all MC versions. \
The only change is the version number in the pack file.

**The package is active, but the Block still looks like before?**\
Make sure that the packet is on top of the activated packet list, i.e. no other pack overwrites the data.\
Also, make sure to use a shader with LabPbr or OldPbr Support.\
For example Complementary or AstraLex BSL Edit.

**Why did I create this pack in the first place?**\
I have created the package originally because I was bored. \
Since I liked it, I have now published it here on Modrinth. So easy can it be :P
